name: Mini Foldable Wireless Bluetooth Keyboard
tagline: Slip it in your pocket. Pull out a full keyboard.
description: Most keyboards demand you adapt to them. The PocketDesk Mini Foldable Wireless Keyboard was built the other way around. Machined from aerospace-grade aluminum with precision scissor-switch keys, it unfolds to a full typing surface in one smooth motion — then folds back to the footprint of a passport. Pair it with your iPhone, iPad, Android, or laptop. Switch between three devices without missing a keystroke. This is what mobile productivity is supposed to feel like.
features: Full QWERTY layout at 97% standard size
Multi-device Bluetooth: pair 3 devices, switch instantly
70-hour battery life on a single charge
Aerospace-grade aluminum build with premium ABS keys
USB-C fast charging — full battery in 90 minutes

reviews.author: Marcus T.
reviews.title: The only travel keyboard worth owning
reviews.body: I've been through four so-called travel keyboards in three years. Every one of them felt like a compromise — mushy keys, flimsy hinges, dead batteries at the worst moment. The PocketDesk is the first one that doesn't ask you to settle. Key travel is real. It pairs in seconds. It fits in my jacket pocket. Nothing else I've tried comes close.

reviews.author: Priya N.
reviews.title: Seamless between iPhone and iPad
reviews.body: Switching between my iPhone and iPad is instant — one button tap and it reconnects before I've even looked up. The battery has lasted weeks on a single charge with my daily use. The aluminum body has a solidity to it that you simply don't expect at this price point. It genuinely feels like a PocketDesk product should.

reviews.author: James W.
reviews.title: Small learning curve, then it's perfect
reviews.body: Took about a day to fully adjust to the layout. By day two I was back to full speed. Build quality is exceptional — I've been throwing it in my laptop bag every day for two months and there's not a scratch on it. The hinge still snaps open with the same satisfying click as when it arrived.
